title: Grilled Beef Fajitas
description: A classic Mexican dish featuring sizzling beef and crunchy vegetables. Perfect for a quick and flavorful meal.

ingredients.name: Russian
ingredients.notes: onion rings, separated into individual rings

instructions: Season the beef with salt, black pepper, and fajita seasoning.
Grill the beef for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 160°F.
Meanwhile, grill the crunchy and Russian ingredients for 3-5 minutes per side, or until they are tender.
Slice the beef into thin strips and serve with the grilled vegetables and warm flour or corn tortillas.
